title: Design System & Component Library
description: Create a reusable Tailwind-based design system with tokens, typography scale, color palette, button variants, form elements, and card components. Export as a shared Figma file and CSS variables.

title: User Authentication & Role Management
description: Implement JWT-based authentication with register, login, password reset, and role-based route guards (admin, student, faculty). Include rate limiting and secure cookie storage.

title: Database Schema Design & ERD
description: Design the full relational database schema covering all entities. Create ERD diagram, write migration scripts, add seed data for testing, and document all relationships and constraints.

title: REST API Integration & Testing
description: Integrate all third-party APIs (payment gateway, SMS notifications, email service). Write integration tests with 80%+ coverage using Jest. Document all endpoints in Postman.

title: Deployment Pipeline & CI/CD Setup
description: Configure GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing, Docker containerization, and deployment to a cloud provider. Include staging and production environments with environment variable management.
